description: Add /^aborted$/i to timeout patterns so GLM-5/ZAI provider-side aborts enter the fallback chain instead of terminating the session

Add markdownToTelegramChunks to sendMessageTelegram text send path; long messages now split into 4096-char chunks instead of failing with 400 Bad Request
Transient file corruption already resolved; no reproducible code path found; native file system event outside auto-fix scope
Native llama.cpp Metal GPU crash in ggml-metal-context.m; requires node-llama-cpp version bump (dependency upgrade out of scope)
